---
title: "Affluence par boucle"
author: "Royer"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
params:
  boucle: "880"


---
# Packages:
```{r}
library(firstlib.royer)

```

# 2.Initialisation variable boucle:
```{r}
boucle<-880
```

# 3.Graphique boucle:
```{r}
df_880<-filtrer_trajet(df_velo,boucle=boucle)
```

```{r}
plot_distribution_semaine(df_880)
```
